items.title: These Were the 5 Top-Performing Stocks in the Dow Jones Industrial Average in 2024
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: The article discusses the top-performing Dow Jones stocks of 2024, including Nvidia, Walmart, American Express, and Goldman Sachs. It highlights the factors that contributed to their strong performance, such as AI enthusiasm, e-commerce growth, and consistent earnings growth.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Nvidia was the best-performing Dow Jones stock in 2024, benefiting from enthusiasm surrounding artificial intelligence (AI).
Walmart's e-commerce initiatives showed success in 2024, with strong comparable sales growth in the U.S. and international businesses.
American Express remained a prominent position in the Berkshire Hathaway portfolio, providing investors with reasons to buy the stock.
Goldman Sachs achieved consistent year-over-year earnings-per-share growth, which was one of the reasons why investors chose to buy the banking stock.

Amazon stock rose notably in 2024, as investors were attracted to its prominent position in AI and its commanding e-commerce presence.
